title: SKILL.md wiring + reference map for bootstrap
description:
FIRST: 'git merge main --no-edit'; verify kb bootstrap + references/bootstrap.md exist.

Wire it in:
- SKILL.md: add a 'Bootstrapping an existing repo' section — the interactive 2-gate flow (agree MECE structure, agree ingestion scope), propose-not-apply, points to 'kb bootstrap' + references/bootstrap.md. Distinguish from plain 'kb init' (init = scaffold; bootstrap = the guided cold-start that seeds content).
- Add a references/bootstrap.md row to the SKILL.md reference-map table.
- Add 'bootstrap' to the kb.py subcommand list in the SKILL.md/commands section.
- Briefly note in references/structure.md that the bootstrap Gate-1 agreement records the chosen structure in the resolver (always MECE).

Test: SKILL.md references bootstrap.md + kb bootstrap; reference map updated; py_compile (if kb.py touched at all).
notes: 2026-06-15 08:57 - [human] In the SKILL.md Bootstrapping section, mention that the mining phase fans out to parallel subagents (fast, non-blocking) while the gates stay interactive — point to the fan-out guidance in bootstrap.md/activation.md.
acceptance_criteria: SKILL.md has a Bootstrapping-an-existing-repo section (2 gates, propose-not-apply) linking kb bootstrap + references/bootstrap.md; reference map + command list updated
